dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back, {{name}}! Track your routines today.
dashboard.start_journey_desc: Start your journey by creating personal or shared habits!
dashboard.tie_message: Mutual support and consistency are in perfect harmony! ❤️🙌
dashboard.lead_message: Awesome! You are leading the board this week! Keep the crown! 👑✨
dashboard.catchup_message: {{name}} is ahead! Quick, complete your daily check-ins to catch up! 🚀🔥
dashboard.waiting_partner: Waiting for your partner to join the board! Invite them to sign up. 🦖🦄
dashboard.m100: Incredible! Together you nailed 100% of today's habits! 🎉❤️
dashboard.m80: You both are doing amazing! Almost there! 🔥
dashboard.m50: Halfway done together! Keep up the momentum! 💪
dashboard.m0: Great start! Support each other to cross the finish line. ✨
dashboard.m_empty: Start checking off habits to spark connection! Let's do this! 🚀

login.welcome_subtitle: Connect, check progress, and grow habits together
login.connection_failed: Connection failed. Please check backend server.

register.create_subtitle: Connect with your spouse to start building consistent habits
register.limit_reached: Registration failed. Is the couple already full (limit 2)?

habits.templates_desc: Click any card to quickly populate the habit form.
habits.pick_template_desc: Create your first custom habit or pick a template above!
habits.delete_habit_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this habit? All progress logs will be permanently deleted.
habits.both_users_log: Both users can log this habit.
habits.add_failed: Failed to add habit. Please try again.
habits.edit_failed: Failed to update habit. Please try again.

shared_goals.shared_goals_desc: Mutual habits that you and your partner track together.
shared_goals.habits_for_two_desc: Shared habits are visible to both you and your partner. When either of you checks off a completion, it updates in real time on both dashboards. Complete them together to raise your combined consistency rate!
shared_goals.no_shared_goals_desc: Go to the Habits page and check "Shared Goal" to coordinate a habit.
shared_goals.milestones_desc: Collect milestones as a couple by completing shared habits.
shared_goals.first_habit_desc: Earned on your very first completed shared log
shared_goals.seven_day_streak_desc: Log completions together for 7 consecutive days

analytics.analytics_desc: Visualize consistency rates and progress curves.
analytics.rate_over_time: Completion Rate Over Time (% per habit)
analytics.no_active_streaks: No active streaks. Complete habits daily to build combos!

profile.profile_desc: Customize your profile card and choose your theme.
profile.themes_desc: Customize your personal visual experience. Opposites are designed to blend harmoniously.
profile.password_placeholder: Leave blank to keep current password

settings_page.danger_zone_desc: Irreversible actions to reset your account data.
settings_page.reset_data_desc: This action will permanently delete all habits, completed logs, streaks, and badge records earned by you and your partner. This action is irreversible.
settings_page.confirm_desc: To confirm this action, please type the word "RESET" below:
settings_page.reset_success: All activity data has been successfully reset! Reloading page...
settings_page.reset_failed: Failed to reset data. Please try again.
settings_page.only_husband_allowed: Only the husband is allowed to delete and reset activity data.

validation.username_min: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters

list_habits.title: Habits Directory
list_habits.desc: Manage and explore all your personal and couple habits.
list_habits.search_placeholder: Search habits by title or description...
list_habits.delete_failed: Failed to delete habit. Please try again.
list_habits.no_personal_habits_desc: Create a personal habit from the Habits tab to start tracking it individually!
list_habits.no_couple_habits_desc: Go to the Habits tab and check "Shared Goal" to start tracking habits together!

activity.title: Habit Activity
activity.desc: Track your daily activity in a monthly table and a yearly heatmap.
activity.monthly_desc: Click cells to log or undo habit completions.
activity.yearly_desc: Visualization of habit consistency over an entire year.
activity.future_date_error: Cannot track habits for future dates!
activity.heatmap_info: Hover over cells to view daily completion details.
